query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A grayscale image showing gentle tonal transitions across a pale field, with a slightly darker area in the upper-left quadrant and faint vertical lines visible toward the right edge.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A grayscale composition exhibiting extreme lack of detail, where surfaces and subjects dissolve into smeared, mushy ambiguity; faint vertical streaks and vague tonal masses appear within a washed-out, pale field, abandoning representational clarity to become an abstract image privileging diffuse shape and monotone texture over recognizable form.
